required_operator_inputs: start from codex/parameter-functionality-campaign on a feature branch
add standalone collatz_transition_strength on the collatz lane
preserve the current Collatz formula at the default value 1.0
use no-mouse persistent runtime proof and avoid repeated viewer relaunch loops
forbidden_operator_prompts: change explaino_collatz authority in this slice
change Color Pipeline, capture finding, FPS pacing, equation-pack viewport integration, perturbation zoom, or generated editors
use OS mouse automation or physical cursor tests
required_validation_commands: py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label pfc_collatz_schema --log artifacts/logs/pfc_collatz_schema.log --out-json artifacts/validation/pfc_collatz_schema.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- ui_app/build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd advanced_color_grading_owner

py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label pfc_collatz_sample --log artifacts/logs/pfc_collatz_sample.log --out-json artifacts/validation/pfc_collatz_sample.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- ui_app/build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd test_fractal_sample_kernel
